---
title: "Resursi"
toc: false
number-sections: false
lang: hr-HR
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          #quarto-sidebar { display: none !important; }
          #quarto-margin-sidebar { display: none !important; }
          .sidebar.sidebar-navigation { display: none !important; }
          .page-columns { display: block !important; }
          main.content, #quarto-document-content {
            max-width: 1100px !important;
            margin-left: auto !important;
            margin-right: auto !important;
            padding-left: 1.5rem !important;
            padding-right: 1.5rem !important;
            grid-column: 1 / -1 !important;
          }
        </style>
---

Materijali za studente i nastavnike: podaci, prezentacije, popisi literature i poveznice na javno dostupne izvore.

## Korisne poveznice

- [Hrvatska narodna banka — statistika](https://www.hnb.hr/statistika)
- [Državni zavod za statistiku](https://podaci.dzs.hr)
- [Eurostat](https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat)
- [OECD Data](https://data.oecd.org)

::: {.callout-note}
Daljnji materijali (datasetovi, slajdovi, primjeri zadataka) u pripremi.
:::
